title: TeamMembershipCompact
description: This object represents a user's connection to a team.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

is_guest.description: Describes if the user is a guest in the team.

is_limited_access.description: Describes if the user has limited access to the team.

is_admin.description: Describes if the user is a team admin.
